summary: Completed comprehensive testing of COMEP Sistema de Monitoramento de Escolas. All core features working correctly including admin/escola authentication, escola listing with 18 schools, blocking/unblocking, PDF reports, and navigation.
passed_tests: Admin login with email: admin@comep.gov.br, senha: admin123 - PASSED
Escola login with codigo_inep: 23056797, CPF: 05174591, senha: 123456 - PASSED
Listagem de 18 escolas no painel admin - PASSED (all 18 schools displayed)
Visualização de detalhes de uma escola específica - PASSED
Bloqueio de escola com motivo - PASSED
Desbloqueio de escola com parecer - PASSED
Geração de PDF de relatório geral de escolas - PASSED (API returns 200 with PDF)
Geração de PDF de relatório de escola individual - PASSED (API returns 200 with PDF)
Dashboard da escola mostrando código INEP corretamente - PASSED (23056797 displayed)
Navegação entre páginas do painel admin (Dashboard, Escolas, Solicitações, Relatórios, Notificações) - PASSED
Dashboard stats API - PASSED (returns correct counts)
Dashboard evolution API - PASSED (returns 6 months data)
Data isolation - escola only sees own docentes and quadro admin - PASSED
seed_data_creation: Database seeded with 18 schools from Pereiro-CE with real INEP codes and director data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. The system uses JWT authentication with separate login flows for admin (email/senha) and escola (codigo_inep/cpf/senha). 18 schools are seeded with real data. Blocking/unblocking functionality works correctly with email notifications (MOCKED - depends on Resend API key). PDF reports generate correctly.

mocked_apis.email_service: Email via Resend is configured but depends on API key. System works without sending emails.
